releaseNotesMarkdown:
## What's new in this update

### Forge Sync improvements

_No commits since last build._

### Forge Tools improvements

- Patrol(noxshade): remove dead ApplyBatch2TickEffects method and its only caller
- Keyforge fixes and spatial forge fixes
- Patrol(forgeheart): redirect PulseLaunching from DropShadowEffect to Border.Opacity
- Forge(wayfinder): fix command name mismatches in Wayfinder tip trigger conditions
- Patrol(glimmerscale): fix LogicSweeper Game Over z-index — particles no longer obscure win/loss message
- Peer(runesmith): deduplicate WayfinderTip array — collapse triplicate tips into single canonical array, fix indentation, normalize naming
- Patrol(loretome): add 1.0.36 changelog block for KeyForge overhaul, BarForge ribbon fix, crash hardening
- Forge(treasureveil): ingredient discovery toast with rarity-scaled reveal
- Elder(cruciwyrm): unsubscribe OnIngredientDiscovered in OnClosed phase 2
- Patrol(lorespell): create RTMTools.UI/README.md — first architecture doc for the UI layer
- Peer(cartomancer): confirm RTMTools.UI/README.md architecture is accurate
- Forge(tempestforge): add ShockwaveModifier to SumForge Mania mode
- Patrol(runeweave): rename StarLinkStar.Clicked to IsClicked for boolean naming consistency
- Forge(oraclevein): add forge-memory query to verify and impact-analysis skills
- Patrol(hearthwind): clarify HealthCheck status pill — shows error/warning counts together
- Peer(runesmith): add prescriptive guidance to HealthCheck report headers
- Patrol(switchyard): add IsLinked guard to SpatialForgeCommand.Run() and add IsLoaded check to zombie recovery
- Patrol(threadguard): fix fire-and-forget async void in ScheduleForCurrentTransition
- Patrol(ironvow): created Sentinel.TryReadTinyJsonField — unified hand-scan JSON parser with null-byte/DoS guards; migrated ForgeSyncInstallerHook.TryReadPendingVersion and ForgeSyncStatusReader.IsSnoozeActive to shared helper
- Patrol(steelward): migrate DuplicateViews and ToggleHalftone to CommandError.ShowOperationFailed
- Forge(plumbersmith-creator): stop all 5 Forever storyboards in ForgeFloatingStatus.OnClosing
- Forge(sumsmith-creator): fix intensity overlay timer leaks and re-trigger races in SumForgeWindow
- Peer(chaosmaw): add StopAllEffectTimers and UnregisterEffectTimer to AnnounceResonanceOverdrive to match tier transition pattern
- Patrol(aegis): Guard GetSelection() null refs, defer OrderBy until needed
- Elder(cruciwyrm): silence double-Unregister in ResonanceOverdriveFade_Tick, add ReduceMotion guard to AnnounceResonanceOverdrive
- Forge(glimmerscale-creator): Stop RepeatBehavior=Forever glow anim and null DropShadowEffect on AchievementBorder in AboutWindow.OnClosing
- Peer(anvilwyrm): catch InvalidOperationException from ItemContainerGenerator during fast window close
- Patrol(swiftblade): add WhereElementIsNotElementType to MatchTagLocationCommand FEC chain

_(+ 20 internal/noise commit(s) hidden)_

### Plugin improvements

_No commits since last build._
